title: Stone tools overhaul
description: Changes the textures of stone tools to a more realistic texture
body:
![Title Stone Tools overhaul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OpYAG29H/images/9887fe4244135b804fee4df8f2514e1e862471e7.png)

This resource pack replaces the old minecraft stone tools textures with new more realistic ones


**All replaced textures**:


![All replaced textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OpYAG29H/images/250f7fcb926725217f1bfc73c5109b882cc4ae81.png)




I hope you enjoyed this resource pack!

My discord server: [Discord link](https://discord.com/invite/SKCbGtehye)
